title: Alan Wake 2
guide: Alan Wake 2 is Remedy Entertainment's long-awaited sequel to the 2010 cult horror title, switching between FBI Agent Saga Anderson investigating a ritual murder in Bright Falls and novelist Alan Wake trapped in the Dark Place. The walkthrough captures the full game across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. Remedy's signature live-action FMV cutscenes intercut with the cinematic gameplay.

chapters.name: Return 1: Invitation
chapters.summary: Saga Anderson and partner Alex Casey arrive at Cauldron Lake investigating the ritualistic Cult of the Tree murder.

chapters.name: Return 2: The Heart
chapters.summary: Mind Place mechanic is introduced; Saga assembles her case board to deduce locations from collected evidence.

chapters.name: Return 3: Local Girl
chapters.summary: Investigation in downtown Bright Falls turning up the Anderson Brothers connection and the Old Gods of Asgard band.

chapters.name: Initiation 1: Late Night
chapters.summary: Switch to Alan Wake trapped in the Dark Place 13 years later, learning the Writer's Room mechanic to alter reality.

chapters.name: Initiation 2: Casey
chapters.summary: Alan rewrites the city around himself, shifting between subway stations and apartment buildings in noir New York.

chapters.name: Return 4: Old Gods
chapters.summary: Saga's investigation at Watery introduces the rocker brothers and their lost album holding clues to the cult.

chapters.name: Initiation 3: Dark Ones
chapters.summary: Alan progresses through the Dark Place's manuscript pages, recasting events around the Cult of the Tree's origin.

chapters.name: Return 5: Old Gods of Asgard
chapters.summary: Live-action musical sequence performed by Poets of the Fall as the Old Gods of Asgard band — Remedy signature moment.

chapters.name: Return 6: Zane's Film
chapters.summary: Saga uncovers filmmaker Thomas Zane's connection to the events of the original Alan Wake; the loop deepens.

chapters.name: Initiation 7: Masters
chapters.summary: Alan confronts Scratch, his dark doppelganger; merging gameplay and narrative threads from both protagonists.

chapters.name: Ending: Departure
chapters.summary: Climactic dual-protagonist finale at Cauldron Lake; the loop is broken but the Dark Place remains.

title: Banishers: Ghosts of New Eden
guide: Banishers: Ghosts of New Eden is Don't Nod's action RPG set in 17th century colonial New England. Red and Antea are Banishers — supernatural hunters tasked with exorcising the dead. After a tragic incident at the haunted village of New Eden, Antea becomes a ghost herself, and Red must choose between resurrecting her at terrible cost or letting her ascend. The walkthrough captures the full campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Arrival in New Eden
chapters.summary: Prologue introducing Red and Antea as banisher partners arriving at the cursed colonial village investigation request.

chapters.name: The Nightmare
chapters.summary: First major encounter with the village's haunting force, ending in Antea's death and her transformation into a ghost.

chapters.name: The Quest for Resolution
chapters.summary: Red awakens to the moral choice driving the campaign: ascension (peace) or resurrection (revenge). The first major village hub opens.

chapters.name: Coastal Wilds
chapters.summary: Open-area exploration of New Eden's foggy coastal forests, introducing the haunting case-investigation gameplay loop.

chapters.name: The Lighthouse Spirit
chapters.summary: First major haunting case at the abandoned lighthouse keeper's residence with branching morality choices.

chapters.name: Trapper's Sorrow
chapters.summary: Side haunting case in the fur trapper's cabin testing the player's chosen ascension-versus-blame philosophy.

chapters.name: The Settler Encampment
chapters.summary: Mid-game hub town with the densest side quest content and the most varied haunting case morality outcomes.

chapters.name: The Iron Mine
chapters.summary: Industrial dungeon level beneath an abandoned mine with the most cumulative haunting from murdered miners.

chapters.name: The Witch's Cabin
chapters.summary: Eponymous haunting at the village witch's burned cabin reveals the deeper conspiracy behind New Eden's curse.

chapters.name: The Final Investigation
chapters.summary: Climactic case uncovering the founding settler's atrocity that triggered the curse cascading across New Eden.

chapters.name: Ending: Ascension or Resurrection
chapters.summary: Two divergent endings determined by Red's accumulated choices — Antea ascends to rest or is bound to Red's body.

title: Control Ultimate Edition
guide: Control Ultimate Edition is Remedy Entertainment's supernatural action-adventure inside The Oldest House, headquarters of the Federal Bureau of Control. Jesse Faden arrives searching for her missing brother and unwittingly becomes the Bureau's new director after the previous director's suicide. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign plus AWE and Foundation DLC across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Welcome to the Oldest House
chapters.summary: Cold open with Jesse's arrival at the Federal Bureau of Control headquarters, ascending the building's shifting architecture.

chapters.name: Unknown Caller
chapters.summary: First exploration of the contaminated administrative sectors, introducing the Hiss infection and Service Weapon.

chapters.name: Directorial Override
chapters.summary: Jesse becomes director after the previous director's suicide, unlocking telekinesis and the central executive offices.

chapters.name: Containment Sector
chapters.summary: Major exploration zone of the Bureau's altered-item storage with the iconic ashtray maze and floating refrigerator.

chapters.name: Old Boys' Club
chapters.summary: Discovery of Marshall's leadership office and the hidden Astral Plane training simulations subway.

chapters.name: Threshold
chapters.summary: Mid-game pivot to Polaris vision sequences and Astral Plane traversal puzzles between physical reality and the Oceanview Motel.

chapters.name: My Brother's Keeper
chapters.summary: Search for Dylan Faden in the Prime Candidate program containment chambers leading to the climactic split-personality fight.

chapters.name: Take Control
chapters.summary: Penultimate Hiss outbreak across the Maintenance sector with the largest combat density and the Hartman miniboss.

chapters.name: Polaris Choice
chapters.summary: Cinematic climax confronting the corruption at the heart of the Oldest House with multi-form Hiss boss.

chapters.name: AWE DLC
chapters.summary: Investigative DLC following an Alan Wake-connected case in the Investigations Sector with horror-tinged shadow mechanics.

chapters.name: Foundation DLC
chapters.summary: Post-game subterranean expansion under the Oldest House discovering the Astral Plane's true geological foundation.

title: Doom: The Dark Ages
guide: Doom: The Dark Ages is id Software's prequel to Doom (2016) and Doom Eternal, set in a medieval techno-fantasy era of the Doom universe. The Slayer fights for the Maykrs in armies of demonic invaders across war-torn realms, wielding a redesigned Shield Saw, the Mace, and reimagined firearms. The walkthrough is a single full-game playthrough on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary — pure cinematic carnage at PS5 Pro fidelity.

chapters.name: The Slayer Awakens
chapters.summary: Cold-open prologue in the Maykr cathedral introduces the Sentinel-era Slayer in a heavily armored medieval form.

chapters.name: The Sentinel City
chapters.summary: First open battlefield level showcasing the Shield Saw parry mechanic and the redesigned movement systems.

chapters.name: Hell's Vanguard
chapters.summary: Demon legions land on the surface; combat encounters scale up to introduce heavy units like the Mancubus variants.

chapters.name: Atlan Mech Battle
chapters.summary: Pilot the colossal Atlan war mech in a kaiju-scale brawl against demonic titans across a ruined coastal city.

chapters.name: Dragon Mount Flight
chapters.summary: Free-flight aerial combat aboard the cybernetic dragon mount engaging flying demons and ground objectives.

chapters.name: Cosmic Realm Descent
chapters.summary: Mid-game shift to the otherworldly cosmic realm, introducing reality-bending arena designs and elite enemy variants.

chapters.name: The Forge of Argent D'Nur
chapters.summary: Ancient Sentinel weapons forge level deepens the lore tying the Dark Ages prequel to the Hell Priest mythology.

chapters.name: Boss: Demon Lord
chapters.summary: Multi-stage boss arena that tests every weapon and the parry-counter system as the campaign pivots to its final act.

chapters.name: The Final Assault
chapters.summary: Climactic siege on the Hell Priest citadel with maximum demon spawning density and the campaign's hardest combat.

chapters.name: Ending: The Dark Ages Conclude
chapters.summary: Cinematic finale that bridges the Dark Ages prequel to the modern Doom (2016) timeline.

title: Dying Light 2: Stay Human
guide: Dying Light 2: Stay Human is Techland's open-world parkour-zombie sequel set 15 years after the original. Aiden Caldwell, a Pilgrim, arrives in the City — one of the last human settlements — searching for his missing sister. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. Both day and night gameplay loops are preserved with their distinct combat tones.

chapters.name: Pilgrim's Path
chapters.summary: Cold open prologue establishing Aiden as a Pilgrim and the broader infection apocalypse setting before his arrival at the City.

chapters.name: Welcome to the City
chapters.summary: First arrival in the Old Villedor district introducing parkour traversal fundamentals and the day/night cycle.

chapters.name: Lawan's Introduction
chapters.summary: Mid-tutorial meeting with the franchise's most popular new character, runner Lawan, and her allegiance to the Survivors.

chapters.name: Bazaar Hub
chapters.summary: First major hub town introducing the faction system: Survivors versus Peacekeepers and the moral allocation choices.

chapters.name: The Storage Facility
chapters.summary: Major mid-game faction-impact mission allocating critical resources between Peacekeeper military or Survivor civilian needs.

chapters.name: The Central Loop
chapters.summary: Second open district unlocking via the X13 facility infiltration with the GRE researchers' viral cure research.

chapters.name: Mia Caldwell
chapters.summary: Reunion with Aiden's sister Mia in the GRE-controlled compound, revealing the conspiracy behind the infection itself.

chapters.name: Night Hunting
chapters.summary: Major nighttime story chapter inside an infested Dark Hollow with the most intense Volatile pursuit sequences.

chapters.name: Faction Power Struggle
chapters.summary: Penultimate confrontation as the Peacekeeper/Survivor balance erupts into open conflict across the City.

chapters.name: Boss: Waltz
chapters.summary: Climactic showdown against the antagonist Waltz at the X13 facility with the most demanding parkour-combat fusion.

chapters.name: Ending: Pilgrim Choice
chapters.summary: Cinematic finale with multiple endings determined by faction allegiance and key moral choices throughout the campaign.

title: Echoes of the End
guide: Echoes of the End is an Icelandic action-adventure from Myrkur Games following Ryn, a former soldier whose latent magical abilities draw her into a continent-spanning conspiracy alongside companion Abram. Combat blends sword strikes with elemental abilities — telekinesis, ranged blasts, environmental manipulation. The world design draws heavily on Icelandic landscape inspiration, with volcanic ridges and frost-bitten coastlines as the backdrop. The walkthrough captures the full game across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Awakening
chapters.summary: Prologue introduces Ryn's amnesia and her first manifestation of magical abilities during a hostile encounter.

chapters.name: The Forest Path
chapters.summary: Open-area exploration teaches movement, basic sword combat, and the initial telekinesis ability tree.

chapters.name: Ruins of the Old Empire
chapters.summary: First dungeon-style location with environmental puzzles, ancient lore, and the first major creature encounter.

chapters.name: Abram's Camp
chapters.summary: Companion introduction; the deuteragonist joins Ryn's journey and introduces the dual-character combat dynamic.

chapters.name: Volcanic Highlands
chapters.summary: Mid-game traversal across active volcanic terrain with new heat-based enemy types and platforming challenges.

chapters.name: The Frozen Sea
chapters.summary: Coastal chapter with shipwreck exploration and the introduction of water-magic puzzle elements.

chapters.name: Boss: The Echo
chapters.summary: First major boss fight against a shadow manifestation of Ryn's past, testing all unlocked abilities so far.

chapters.name: The Capital
chapters.summary: Urban hub area with NPC interactions, political intrigue, and side-quest density in the largest open zone.

chapters.name: Underground Archive
chapters.summary: Lore-heavy dungeon revealing the true conspiracy behind Ryn's powers and the kingdom's history.

chapters.name: Final Confrontation
chapters.summary: Multi-phase climax against the antagonist combining all elemental abilities and Abram's combat assistance.

chapters.name: Ending: The Echo Resolved
chapters.summary: Cinematic resolution determining Ryn's choice between erasing her powers or accepting the responsibility.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
guide: Ghost of Tsushima is Sucker Punch Productions' open-world samurai epic set in 1274 during the first Mongol invasion of Japan. Jin Sakai, the last of his clan, must abandon the samurai code to wage guerrilla war against the invaders as the legendary Ghost. The walkthrough captures the full campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary, including the Iki Island expansion content.

chapters.name: Komoda Beach
chapters.summary: Opening battle disaster on Komoda Beach where the samurai forces fall to Mongol khan Khotun Khan in the first invasion wave.

chapters.name: Yuna's Aid
chapters.summary: Thief Yuna rescues a wounded Jin and treats his injuries, beginning the journey to rescue his uncle Lord Shimura.

chapters.name: Castle Kaneda
chapters.summary: First major rescue operation infiltrating the Mongol-held castle to free Jin's uncle from the Khan's capture.

chapters.name: Ryuzo Betrayal
chapters.summary: Jin's childhood friend Ryuzo turns traitor as his Straw Hat ronin band sides with the Mongols for survival.

chapters.name: The Tale of Sensei Ishikawa
chapters.summary: First major companion side-arc following the master archer hunting his former student turned traitor.

chapters.name: The Tale of Lady Masako
chapters.summary: Female samurai companion arc seeking revenge against the conspirators who massacred her family.

chapters.name: The Six Blades of Kojiro
chapters.summary: Mythic Tales side mission introducing the dual-wielding ronin assassin and dueling combat challenges.

chapters.name: Toyotama Region
chapters.summary: Mid-game opening of the second island region with new Mongol commanders and stealth-heavy operations.

chapters.name: Mongol Stronghold Liberation
chapters.summary: Series of major stronghold infiltrations using the Ghost stance and chain-assassination mechanics.

chapters.name: Kamiagata Region
chapters.summary: Final region of the main island with the coldest terrain, hardest enemy density, and most dramatic vistas.

chapters.name: Boss: Khotun Khan
chapters.summary: Multi-phase climactic duel against the Khan in a burning fortress with environmental fire hazards and minions.

chapters.name: Iki Island Expansion
chapters.summary: Post-game DLC arc following Jin to Iki Island confronting his past trauma and the Eagle Mongol shamans.

title: Ghost of Yōtei
guide: Ghost of Yotei is Sucker Punch's follow-up to Ghost of Tsushima, set centuries later in 1603 Hokkaido around the Mount Yotei region. Players take on the protagonist Atsu, a wandering swordswoman seeking vengeance against the Yotei Six who killed her family. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. The cinematic playthrough preserves Sucker Punch's signature wind-guided traversal and standoff combat.

chapters.name: Yotei Foothills
chapters.summary: Prologue introducing Atsu, her family's death at the hands of the Yotei Six, and the vengeance oath driving the plot.

chapters.name: First Target: The Snake
chapters.summary: Tracking the first member of the Yotei Six through bandit-controlled trading routes east of Mount Yotei.

chapters.name: Ainu Settlement
chapters.summary: Cultural exchange chapter highlighting the indigenous Ainu people of Hokkaido, their language, and their traditions.

chapters.name: Standoff: The Snake
chapters.summary: Boss duel with the first Yotei Six member in cinematic standoff format with the iconic gust-of-wind framing.

chapters.name: Mountain Pass
chapters.summary: Open-world traversal across snowy ridges with wolf pack ambushes, hot spring shrines, and bamboo strike challenges.

chapters.name: Second Target: The Spider
chapters.summary: Stealth-heavy chapter through a coastal merchant town controlled by the Spider's poison-dart assassins.

chapters.name: Companion Arc: The Ronin
chapters.summary: Atsu recruits a wandering ronin to support the campaign against the remaining Yotei Six members.

chapters.name: Third Target: The Boar
chapters.summary: Heavy assault on a fortified mining camp with a hulking warrior antagonist using a massive war hammer.

chapters.name: Hokkaido Coast
chapters.summary: Coastal exploration zone with fishing village politics, ghost legend side quests, and seabird-guided paths.

chapters.name: Fourth and Fifth Targets
chapters.summary: Paired confrontation in a moonlit forest sequence with the most dynamic dual-target combat scenario.

chapters.name: Sixth Target: The Dragon
chapters.summary: Climactic ascent of Mount Yotei to face the final Yotei Six leader in a snowstorm volcanic summit duel.

chapters.name: Ending: Vengeance Complete
chapters.summary: Quiet epilogue at the family grave site with Atsu's choice of returning to her village or wandering Hokkaido.

title: God of War (2018)
guide: God of War (2018) reboots Santa Monica Studio's franchise with a one-take camera, Norse mythology setting, and an emphasis on father-son storytelling. Kratos and his young son Atreus journey across Midgard, Alfheim, and Helheim to scatter the ashes of Kratos's wife from the highest peak in the realms. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary, presented as one continuous cinematic playthrough.

chapters.name: The Marked Trees
chapters.summary: Cold open in the woodland home where Kratos teaches Atreus to hunt; the Stranger arrives setting the conflict in motion.

chapters.name: Path to the Mountain
chapters.summary: First journey toward the highest peak begins; mystic gateway puzzles introduce the Bifrost mechanic.

chapters.name: The Light of Alfheim
chapters.summary: Realm-hopping to recover the bridge keeper light from the dark elves and Light Elves' civil war.

chapters.name: Inside the Mountain
chapters.summary: Mining tunnels lead deep into Midgard's heart with the first Hel-Walker undead encounters.

chapters.name: A New Destination
chapters.summary: Pivotal twist redirects Kratos and Atreus toward Jotunheim, the giants' realm, rather than the original peak.

chapters.name: The Sickness
chapters.summary: Atreus falls gravely ill forcing a desperate descent into Helheim to retrieve the heart of a Helbringer.

chapters.name: The Magic Chisel
chapters.summary: Tyr's temple puzzle gauntlet at the World Serpent's spine, recovering the chisel needed to unseal Jotunheim.

chapters.name: Behind the Lock
chapters.summary: Black Rune restoration in Veithurgard area, opening the secret passage to the giants' lost knowledge.

chapters.name: The Black Rune
chapters.summary: Combat-heavy chapter through Konunsgard's ruins, retrieving the Black Rune from the dragon Hraezlyr.

chapters.name: Boss: Baldur
chapters.summary: Multiple-phase final boss against the immortal Stranger atop the world serpent's body in the climactic battle.

chapters.name: Mother's Ashes
chapters.summary: Ending pilgrimage to the Jotunheim peak; Faye's true heritage as a giant is revealed via temple murals.

title: God of War Ragnarök
guide: God of War Ragnarok concludes Santa Monica Studio's Norse saga, following Kratos and his son Atreus through the prophesied end of the Aesir gods. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling. Combat layers the Leviathan Axe, Blades of Chaos, and the new Draupnir Spear with refined parries and runic attacks. All nine realms are explored in cinematic fidelity, no commentary.

chapters.name: Fimbulwinter
chapters.summary: Three years after 2018's ending, Kratos and Atreus open the game tracking a wolf in deep winter snow before a hostile encounter with Freya.

chapters.name: Surviving Fimbulwinter
chapters.summary: Sindri and Brok return to repair the workshop; Kratos and Atreus prepare for the journey across realms.

chapters.name: The Quest for Tyr
chapters.summary: Search for the missing Norse god Tyr to broker an alliance against Odin and prevent the foretold Ragnarok.

chapters.name: Groa's Shrine
chapters.summary: Vanaheim exploration unlocks the giant Jotunn vision and the prophecy of Atreus's fate as Loki.

chapters.name: Forging Destiny
chapters.summary: Crafting the Draupnir Spear in Svartalfheim's dwarven forge introduces the new third weapon to the combat sandbox.

chapters.name: Reunion
chapters.summary: Atreus secretly travels to Asgard alone, befriending Odin and Thrud while Kratos searches Niflheim for the boy.

chapters.name: The Realms at War
chapters.summary: Open conflict erupts as Kratos rallies Surtr, Freya, and the survivors of Asgard's persecuted dissidents.

chapters.name: Creatures of Prophecy
chapters.summary: Kratos confronts the prophecy of his own death and accepts the role of leading the assault on Asgard.

chapters.name: Unleashing Hel
chapters.summary: Garm the monstrous wolf is freed in Helheim, opening rifts across all nine realms and accelerating Ragnarok.

chapters.name: The Summoning
chapters.summary: Allied armies gather at the Shores of Nine — dwarves, Vanir, Asgardian rebels, and giants prepare to march.

chapters.name: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: The full-scale assault on Asgard with Thor boss fight, the destruction of the Bifrost, and the city's collapse.

chapters.name: Boss: Odin
chapters.summary: Final confrontation with the Allfather in his transformed magical form atop the broken throne room ruins.

chapters.name: Ending: Father and Son
chapters.summary: Kratos accepts a new role as a hero remembered by the realms; Atreus departs to find other giants in hiding.

title: Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy
guide: Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy is Eidos-Montréal's narrative-driven action-adventure following Peter Quill leading his team — Gamora, Drax, Rocket, and Groot — across the cosmic Marvel universe. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. The cinematic playthrough preserves the team huddle dialogue trees and licensed 80s soundtrack callouts.

chapters.name: The Quarantine Zone
chapters.summary: Opening Quarantine Zone mission with Peter, Gamora, and Drax hunting a Monster as a smuggling job for the Nova Corps.

chapters.name: Lady Hellbender's Arena
chapters.summary: Arrival at the gladiator queen's arena negotiating the team's debt with the iconic team huddle dialogue mechanic.

chapters.name: Knowhere
chapters.summary: Hub-area exploration of the Collector's Knowhere station with the densest side conversation and shop interaction content.

chapters.name: The Promise
chapters.summary: Major mid-game choice sequence determining the loyalty of various Guardians and the trajectory of the campaign.

chapters.name: Seknarf Nine
chapters.summary: Mid-campaign desert planet exploration with the introduction of Cosmo the Space Dog as a major support character.

chapters.name: Worldmind's Vault
chapters.summary: Nova Corps base infiltration with the most environmental puzzles and the heaviest stealth gameplay in the campaign.

chapters.name: Halfworld
chapters.summary: Rocket-focused planet revealing the procedural creation of the cybernetic raccoon at the experimentation labs.

chapters.name: Magus Cult Pursuit
chapters.summary: Action-heavy chapter following the Promise pirate gang's reveal as the antagonist cult of the Magus Universal Church.

chapters.name: Boss: Adam Warlock
chapters.summary: Penultimate confrontation against the cult's Magus avatar in a multi-phase cosmic arena combining all weapon swap dynamics.

chapters.name: Boss: The Magus Itself
chapters.summary: Final cinematic battle against the cult's true reality-warping cosmic horror form at the Universal Church's center.

chapters.name: Ending: Guardians
chapters.summary: Cinematic finale resolving the team's chosen-family arc and the new equilibrium across the cosmic Marvel universe.

title: Hogwarts Legacy
guide: Hogwarts Legacy is Avalanche Software's open-world action RPG set in the late 1800s wizarding world, a century before the Harry Potter book series. The player creates a fifth-year transfer student to Hogwarts who possesses rare Ancient Magic, drawn into a goblin rebellion led by Ranrok. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across three parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Arrival at Hogwarts
chapters.summary: Opening Thestral coach prologue, Sorting Hat ceremony, and first introduction to the iconic castle's hub features.

chapters.name: Welcoming Feast
chapters.summary: House-specific dormitory introduction with Professor Fig as mentor and the first reveal of Ancient Magic ability.

chapters.name: Charms Class
chapters.summary: First spell tutorial unlocking Levioso, Accio, and basic Incendio with combat against the Spider creature attack.

chapters.name: Hogsmeade Trip
chapters.summary: First village exploration introducing shops, broom flying tutorial, and the side quest density of the wizarding town.

chapters.name: Forbidden Forest
chapters.summary: Mandrake harvest mission deep in the spider-infested Forbidden Forest with Sebastian Sallow's secrets revealed.

chapters.name: House Quest: Slytherin (or yours)
chapters.summary: House-specific quest line giving each house unique content; Slytherin's Sebastian Sallow arc is the most narratively rich.

chapters.name: Hogwarts Battle Trials
chapters.summary: Mid-game Map Chamber discoveries with the Pensieve Guardian trials unlocking Ancient Magic combat throw mechanics.

chapters.name: Goblin Mine Infiltration
chapters.summary: Action-heavy infiltration of Ranrok's goblin mine compound revealing the magical mineral fueling the rebellion.

chapters.name: Cromwell Manor
chapters.summary: Investigation into the dark wizard's ancestral home with the most dense puzzle gauntlet in the campaign.

chapters.name: Goblin Loyalist Camp
chapters.summary: Major siege battle ally with Professor Fig assaulting Ranrok's fortified stronghold in the mountain valley.

chapters.name: Boss: Ranrok Final
chapters.summary: Multi-phase climactic boss fight against Ranrok in his Ancient Magic-corrupted dragon form deep underground.

chapters.name: Ending: End-of-Year Feast
chapters.summary: Cinematic conclusion at Hogwarts' end-of-year celebration with house-specific cutscene variants.

title: Horizon Forbidden West
guide: Horizon Forbidden West is Guerrilla Games' sequel set six months after Zero Dawn. Aloy travels west across post-apocalyptic North America (modern California, Nevada, and Utah) to find the source of a deadly red blight killing biospheres and confront the Far Zenith rogue AI faction. The walkthrough captures the full campaign including the Burning Shores DLC across three parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Reach for the Stars
chapters.summary: Opening prologue establishes the blight crisis and Aloy's quest west, ending with the search for GAIA's backup.

chapters.name: To the Brink
chapters.summary: Crossing the Forbidden West frontier into Tenakth tribal territory; first encounters with new Clamberjaw machines.

chapters.name: The Embassy
chapters.summary: Major hub town introducing diplomatic gameplay between Tenakth clans, the Carja envoys, and Aloy's mediator role.

chapters.name: The Daunt
chapters.summary: First major exploration zone with new Slitherfang machines and the workshop-restoration quest line.

chapters.name: Death's Door
chapters.summary: Discovery of the Zenith faction's true origins and their pursuit of GAIA's subordinate functions across the west.

chapters.name: Faro's Tomb
chapters.summary: Dungeon descent into Ted Faro's hidden bunker revealing his transformed mutated form in horror-tinged sequences.

chapters.name: The Sea of Sands
chapters.summary: Open desert traversal with the first appearance of the colossal Tremortusk machines and dune-buggy stealth.

chapters.name: Cauldron IOTA
chapters.summary: Mid-game machine factory infiltration unlocking the ability to override Tremortusks and Apex predator machines.

chapters.name: Boss: Erend's Rescue
chapters.summary: Major mid-game set piece rescuing Aloy's ally with Tremortusk warthog combat and the Tideripper boss.

chapters.name: Singularity
chapters.summary: Penultimate chapter assaulting the Far Zenith base in Nevada with the highest enemy density in the campaign.

chapters.name: Boss: Tilda van der Meer
chapters.summary: Final confrontation against the immortal Zenith antagonist piloting a Specter combat mech in a mountaintop arena.

chapters.name: Burning Shores DLC
chapters.summary: Post-game expansion taking Aloy to Los Angeles' flooded ruins, featuring the colossal Horus Titan boss climax.

title: Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered
guide: Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered is Guerrilla Games' enhanced edition of the 2017 original, with PS5 Pro native rendering, rebuilt environmental detail, and reworked facial capture. Aloy, a Nora outcast, sets out to discover her origins and the mystery behind the giant machines that roam the post-apocalyptic Earth. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary, including The Frozen Wilds DLC.

chapters.name: Prologue: A Present from the Past
chapters.summary: Young Aloy discovers the Focus device in the Nora caves, beginning her journey as Rost's outcast pupil.

chapters.name: The Proving
chapters.summary: The Nora tribe ceremony where Aloy competes for tribal recognition before the catastrophic attack by Eclipse zealots.

chapters.name: The Womb of the Mountain
chapters.summary: Investigation of the All-Mother sacred caves revealing the first hints of Aloy's true origin and the Old Ones tech.

chapters.name: The City of the Sun
chapters.summary: Arrival in Meridian, the Carja capital city, with diplomatic intrigue and the Sun King Avad's court.

chapters.name: The Field of the Fallen
chapters.summary: Battle-scarred plains exploration with the first major Cauldron infiltration unlocking machine overrides.

chapters.name: Maker's End
chapters.summary: Old World Faro Automated Solutions corporate ruins reveal the truth of the Faro Plague and humanity's extinction.

chapters.name: The Grave Hoard
chapters.summary: Cold mountain ruins providing the second backstory chapter of the Old Ones' final days and Zero Dawn project.

chapters.name: GAIA Prime
chapters.summary: Climactic reveal of Aloy's identity as Elisabet Sobeck's clone created to restore GAIA's destroyed AI consciousness.

chapters.name: The Battle of Meridian
chapters.summary: Penultimate large-scale battle defending the Carja capital from the corrupted HADES forces and Eclipse cult.

chapters.name: Boss: HADES
chapters.summary: Final confrontation against the corrupted extinction AI HADES atop the Spire in central Meridian.

chapters.name: The Frozen Wilds DLC
chapters.summary: Post-game expansion in the snowy Cut region featuring the daemonic CYAN AI and the new fire-machine variants.

title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
guide: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle is MachineGames' first-person action-adventure following Dr. Henry Jones Jr. in 1937, investigating a global conspiracy after a midnight artifact theft at Marshall College. The walkthrough captures the full campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. The cinematic playthrough showcases the game's photoreal facial capture of Troy Baker as Indy and the period-accurate art direction.

chapters.name: Prologue: The Marshall College Midnight Break-in
chapters.summary: Stealth-focused opening chapter establishing Indy's whip combat, fist-fighting, and the artifact theft that drives the plot.

chapters.name: Vatican City
chapters.summary: Major open exploration hub with rooftop traversal, Italian fascist patrols, and the introduction of journalist Gina Lombardi.

chapters.name: Sistine Chapel Investigation
chapters.summary: Stealth and puzzle-driven sequence inside one of gaming's most accurate art-historical recreations.

chapters.name: Gizeh Plateau
chapters.summary: Egyptian desert chapter with camel traversal, hidden tomb discovery, and the first Voss confrontation.

chapters.name: Great Pyramid Interior
chapters.summary: Tomb-crawling dungeon segment with rolling boulder traps, mummy ambushes, and ancient device puzzles.

chapters.name: Shanghai
chapters.summary: Noir-tinged 1930s metropolis chapter with chase sequences, smuggler dens, and Pan Am Clipper exit setpiece.

chapters.name: Himalayas
chapters.summary: Mountain monastery section emphasizing climbing puzzles and Buddhist temple lore, recovering the second artifact.

chapters.name: Sukhothai Jungle
chapters.summary: Thai jungle ruins level with the largest open-area exploration and the most diverse animal encounters.

chapters.name: Iraq Sequence
chapters.summary: Mid-eastern fortress siege with the heaviest combat density and the rival archaeologist Locus boss fight.

chapters.name: Vatican Return
chapters.summary: Climactic infiltration of an artifact convergence ceremony beneath St. Peter's Basilica with cinematic stealth.

chapters.name: Final Boss: Voss
chapters.summary: Penultimate confrontation with the Nazi antagonist and the awakening of the Great Circle's true power.

chapters.name: Ending: Marshall College
chapters.summary: Quiet epilogue with Indy returning to teaching and the post-credits hook setting up further adventures.

title: Ratchet & Clank: Rift Apart
guide: Ratchet & Clank: Rift Apart is Insomniac Games' PS5 launch-window title showcasing the SSD with instantaneous dimensional rift transitions. Ratchet and Clank confront Dr. Nefarious in a multiverse-spanning adventure that introduces Rivet, a Lombax resistance fighter from an alternate dimension. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary, with weapons preserved at maximum visual fidelity.

chapters.name: Megalopolis Parade
chapters.summary: Opening parade celebrating Ratchet and Clank's heroism is interrupted by Dr. Nefarious's emperor multiverse invasion.

chapters.name: Dimensional Rift
chapters.summary: The Dimensionator is sabotaged scattering Ratchet and Clank across multiple realities through chaotic dimensional tears.

chapters.name: Sargasso Wilds
chapters.summary: First Rivet chapter exploring the swampy planet Sargasso with the Speetle mount traversal and the Mrs. Zurkon merchant.

chapters.name: Corson V
chapters.summary: Industrial planet sequence with Ratchet on the run from Goon Squad enforcers and the new Topiary Sprinkler tactical weapon.

chapters.name: Blizar Prime
chapters.summary: Mining-planet level showcasing the SSD's dimensional shifting between two parallel timeline versions of the same map.

chapters.name: Scarstu Debris Field
chapters.summary: Space pirate hub area introducing Captain Quantum Phantom and the planet-hopping rift mode of traversal.

chapters.name: Cordelion
chapters.summary: Robotic planet chapter with Kit's introduction as Clank's alternate-dimension counterpart and stealth puzzle gameplay.

chapters.name: Savali
chapters.summary: Penultimate planet visit exploring the Lombax homeworld's discovery and the lost civilization mysteries.

chapters.name: Boss: Nefarious Emperor
chapters.summary: Multi-phase climactic battle against Dr. Nefarious's empowered emperor form across collapsing dimensional arenas.

chapters.name: Ending: Multiverse Restored
chapters.summary: Cinematic resolution with the Dimensionator repaired, Rivet joining the team, and the multiverse's restoration.

title: Resident Evil 2 Remake
guide: Resident Evil 2 Remake is Capcom's 2019 reimagining of the 1998 PlayStation classic, rebuilt in the RE Engine with over-the-shoulder controls and reactive zombie AI. Rookie cop Leon Kennedy and college student Claire Redfield navigate the doomed Raccoon City Police Department on his first day on the job, the same night the T-Virus outbreak transforms the city. This walkthrough captures the full playthrough on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary, focused on cinematic storytelling.

chapters.name: Gas Station
chapters.summary: Prologue establishing the outbreak as Leon and Claire meet at a roadside stop overrun by the infected.

chapters.name: RPD Main Hall
chapters.summary: Hub of the early game with the iconic statue puzzle, medallion hunt, and first Mr. X stalking encounter.

chapters.name: RPD West Wing
chapters.summary: Library, S.T.A.R.S. office, and dark room sequences with limited ammo and the persistent Tyrant pressure.

chapters.name: RPD East Wing
chapters.summary: Art room puzzles, lockers with maiden keys, and the harrowing dog kennel ambush sequence.

chapters.name: Underground Sewers
chapters.summary: Descent below the station with G-Birkin's second mutation form and the cable car traversal puzzle.

chapters.name: Boss: Birkin G2
chapters.summary: Mid-game boss in the sewer holding cell room demanding precise weapon switching and dodge timing.

chapters.name: NEST Laboratory
chapters.summary: Umbrella's underground research facility with the famous chess piece puzzle and herb cultivation rooms.

chapters.name: Tyrant Final Form
chapters.summary: Train depot escape sequence as G-Birkin reaches his final monstrous mutation aboard the evacuation train.

chapters.name: Ending: Escape
chapters.summary: Final platform showdown and the cinematic conclusion of the campaign with classic Resident Evil epilogue text.

title: Resident Evil 3 Remake
guide: Resident Evil 3 Remake follows Jill Valentine, ex-S.T.A.R.S. operative trapped in Raccoon City as the T-Virus outbreak escalates. Throughout the campaign she is hunted by Nemesis, an Umbrella-engineered bio-weapon programmed to eliminate all S.T.A.R.S. members. The action skews more toward combat than RE2's slower horror pacing. This walkthrough is a complete cinematic playthrough on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Jill's Apartment
chapters.summary: Nemesis bursts through Jill's wall to open the game in one of the most iconic introductions of the franchise.

chapters.name: Raccoon City Streets
chapters.summary: Open-area combat across a burning urban setting with collapsed buildings, gas station fire, and chained Cerberus dogs.

chapters.name: Downtown Substation
chapters.summary: Restoring power across the burning district to unlock the train to the police precinct, dodging Nemesis attacks.

chapters.name: Subway Tunnels
chapters.summary: Carlos Oliveira gameplay segment introduces the U.B.C.S. soldier and his automatic rifle loadout in the metro depths.

chapters.name: Sewer Detour
chapters.summary: Hunter Gamma underwater predator section emphasizes shotgun crowd control in flooded utility passages.

chapters.name: Hospital
chapters.summary: Carlos sequence inside Raccoon General; defends barricades against waves of zombies before vaccine retrieval.

chapters.name: Nemesis Boss 1
chapters.summary: Flamethrower-wielding Nemesis form fights in the open clocktower plaza using environmental electric grids.

chapters.name: NEST 2 Laboratory
chapters.summary: Umbrella's secondary research facility with t-Vaccine synthesis puzzle and Hunter Beta ambushes.

chapters.name: Final Boss: Nemesis
chapters.summary: Multi-phase climax with railgun support and the cinematic destruction of Raccoon City by the bombing strike.

title: Resident Evil 4 Remake
guide: Resident Evil 4 Remake reimagines Capcom's 2005 classic with the RE Engine, rebuilt combat systems, and modernized pacing. Leon S. Kennedy travels to a rural European village to rescue the President's daughter Ashley Graham from a parasitic cult known as Los Iluminados. The walkthrough captures the full campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling — Village, Castle, and Island acts rendered with high-fidelity lighting and crisp particle effects. No commentary, pure cinematic playthrough.

chapters.name: Village Outskirts
chapters.summary: Leon's arrival in rural Spain, first Ganado encounters, and the iconic chainsaw villager fight in the opening farm sequence.

chapters.name: Village Square
chapters.summary: Massive set-piece defense against waves of villagers, culminating with the church bell signal that ends the assault.

chapters.name: Pueblo Outskirts
chapters.summary: Tracking Ashley through the surrounding woods, mining tunnels, and the first encounter with Del Lago in the lake boss fight.

chapters.name: Castle Approach
chapters.summary: Transition into the gothic Salazar Castle territory, introducing armored knights, mendez encounters, and merchant exchanges.

chapters.name: Castle Interior
chapters.summary: Ashley accompanies Leon through ornate halls, puzzle rooms, and the harrowing Garrador blind enemy encounters.

chapters.name: Sewers and Cells
chapters.summary: Castle dungeon descent with regenerating verdugo enemies and the iconic minecart escape sequence.

chapters.name: Salazar Confrontation
chapters.summary: Two-phase boss fight against Ramon Salazar and his transformed final form deep within the castle keep.

chapters.name: Island Approach
chapters.summary: Boat infiltration of the military island base where Saddler runs the cult's command operations.

chapters.name: Island Facility
chapters.summary: Heavily armed Ganados patrol modern industrial areas; gunpowder Ada Wong subplot intersects the main path.

chapters.name: Krauser Duel
chapters.summary: Knife-on-knife dueling sequence against Leon's former Operation Javier ally turned villain.

chapters.name: Final Boss: Saddler
chapters.summary: Multi-stage cult leader boss combining tentacled mutation phases and the rocket launcher finale on the helipad.

chapters.name: Escape
chapters.summary: Time-limited jet-ski escape sequence with Ashley as the island self-destructs, closing the campaign.

title: Resident Evil Requiem
guide: Resident Evil Requiem is the next mainline entry in Capcom's survival horror franchise, returning to a more psychological, suspense-driven style after the action-focused turn of Village. The walkthrough captures the full game across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary — every cinematic moment, every puzzle, every enemy encounter rendered with maximum visual fidelity. Capcom's RE Engine pushes detailed lighting, fluid character animation, and dense environmental detail. The cinematic playthrough lets viewers experience the horror as theater rather than gameplay.

chapters.name: Opening: The Investigation Begins
chapters.summary: Cold open establishes the new protagonist, the setting, and the mystery driving the investigation forward into hostile territory.

chapters.name: First Descent
chapters.summary: Initial exploration of the central location, discovering the first signs of biological contamination and the threat ahead.

chapters.name: The Locked Wing
chapters.summary: Classic Resident Evil puzzle gating with item combinations, environmental clues, and the first major creature encounter.

chapters.name: Underground Laboratory
chapters.summary: Descent into the corporate research facility reveals the experiments that triggered the outbreak and introduces new mutated enemy types.

chapters.name: Boss: The First Tyrant
chapters.summary: Multi-phase combat against a monstrous bio-weapon in a cramped arena that demands resource management and pattern recognition.

chapters.name: Communication Tower
chapters.summary: Mid-game traversal section emphasizing stealth and ammunition conservation while restoring power to call for extraction.

chapters.name: The Survivors
chapters.summary: Encounter with NPCs adds moral weight to the journey and provides exposition about the broader conspiracy unfolding.

chapters.name: Final Descent
chapters.summary: Return to the contaminated core for the climax, including the most challenging puzzle sequence and limited save points.

chapters.name: Ending: The Last Confrontation
chapters.summary: Boss finale, narrative resolution, and post-credits hook setting up the next Resident Evil chapter.

title: Silent Hill 2 Remake
guide: Silent Hill 2 Remake is Bloober Team and Konami's full ground-up remake of the 2001 PlayStation 2 psychological horror classic. James Sunderland returns to the cursed town of Silent Hill after receiving a letter from his late wife Mary. The walkthrough captures the full campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. The cinematic playthrough preserves the slow, dread-filled pacing of the original.

chapters.name: Toluca Lake
chapters.summary: Prologue at the lake's foggy shore where James reads the letter from his deceased wife Mary calling him to Silent Hill.

chapters.name: Wood Side Apartments
chapters.summary: First major dungeon in the abandoned Wood Side complex introducing Pyramid Head and the closet locked Mannequin enemy.

chapters.name: Blue Creek Apartments
chapters.summary: Second apartment block exploration with the iconic mirror room and the encounter with Angela Orosco.

chapters.name: Brookhaven Hospital
chapters.summary: Mid-game psychiatric hospital sequence with the Bubble Head Nurse enemies and the disturbing Eddie cafeteria encounter.

chapters.name: Otherworld Hospital
chapters.summary: Transition to the Otherworld version of Brookhaven with the dreadful long-corridor pursuit sequence.

chapters.name: Toluca Prison
chapters.summary: Underground prison level with the second Pyramid Head encounter and the discovery of James' true nature.

chapters.name: Lakeview Hotel
chapters.summary: Penultimate location at the burned hotel where James and Mary spent their honeymoon, revealing the campaign's truth.

chapters.name: Otherworld Lakeview
chapters.summary: Climactic descent through the corrupted version of the hotel with the dual Pyramid Head boss fight.

chapters.name: Ending: Truth
chapters.summary: Cinematic finale with multiple possible endings determined by accumulated player behavior throughout the campaign.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man 2
guide: Marvel's Spider-Man 2 from Insomniac Games is the PS5 sequel pairing Peter Parker and Miles Morales as dual playable heroes in an expanded Marvel's New York featuring Queens and Brooklyn. Kraven the Hunter arrives in the city hunting metahumans while Peter struggles with the alien symbiote suit. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Sandman
chapters.summary: Opening boss fight against a colossal Sandman across midtown Manhattan in a dual-Spider-Man team-up.

chapters.name: Peter and MJ

chapters.name: Brooklyn Opens
chapters.summary: First major exploration of the new Brooklyn open-world area unlocked exclusively as Miles in the early game.

chapters.name: Lizard Hunt

chapters.name: Kraven Arrives
chapters.summary: Kraven the Hunter's introduction and his squad's first attempt to capture Spider-Man in Central Park.

chapters.name: Symbiote Suit
chapters.summary: Peter discovers the black symbiote suit at the lab, unlocking new aggressive combat abilities and tendril mechanics.

chapters.name: Hunt for Connors
chapters.summary: Lizard transforms into a massive form requiring the Spider-Heroes to team up across the Coney Island boardwalk.

chapters.name: MJ Stealth Section
chapters.summary: Mary Jane gameplay chapter sneaking through a Kraven-occupied EMF facility with the redesigned tranquilizer stealth.

chapters.name: Symbiote Spread
chapters.summary: Symbiote contamination begins infecting civilians; Peter's behavior shifts darker as the suit takes hold.

chapters.name: Venom Birth
chapters.summary: Pivotal chapter transforming Harry Osborn into Venom in the dramatic Roosevelt Island lab confrontation.

chapters.name: Manhattan Crisis
chapters.summary: Symbiote outbreak across the city with the largest dynamic combat encounters, swarm enemies, and rescues.

chapters.name: Ending: Brotherhood
chapters.summary: Climactic battle against Venom on the Brooklyn Bridge; closing chapter passes the Spider-Man mantle to Miles.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales
guide: Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales is the standalone Insomniac follow-up to the 2018 original, following Miles Morales' first solo Spider-Man Christmas in a snow-covered Harlem. Peter Parker is away in Europe so Miles takes up the mantle alone against the Tinkerer and the Roxxon Energy corporation. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Rikers Prison Break
chapters.summary: Opening team-up with Peter Parker thwarting a Rikers Island prison break before Peter departs for Europe.

chapters.name: Roxxon Plaza

chapters.name: Underground Tinkerer
chapters.summary: Discovery of the Underground rebel group fighting Roxxon, led by the mysterious Tinkerer with high-tech weapons.

chapters.name: Phin Mason Reveal
chapters.summary: Miles' childhood friend Phin is unmasked as the Tinkerer in a devastating personal twist.

chapters.summary: Stealth-heavy infiltration of Roxxon's corporate tower learning the truth of Phin's brother Rick's death.

chapters.summary: Open warfare in Manhattan between the Underground rebels and Roxxon mercenaries with citywide combat encounters.

chapters.summary: Roxxon Plaza reactor goes critical; Miles must defeat Phin to stop it from destroying Harlem in a giant explosion.

chapters.name: Ending: Spider-Man of Harlem
chapters.summary: Cinematic resolution establishing Miles as the official second Spider-Man of New York City.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man Remastered
guide: Marvel's Spider-Man Remastered is the PS5 enhanced edition of the 2018 original, with rebuilt facial capture, improved lighting, and ray-traced reflections across Manhattan. Peter Parker has been Spider-Man for eight years and balances superheroics with his day job at Otto Octavius's lab. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Octavius Lab Work
chapters.summary: Peter assists Otto Octavius developing prosthetic neural interfaces, foreshadowing the Doctor Octopus turn.

chapters.name: Aunt May's F.E.A.S.T.

chapters.summary: Doctor Octopus liberates Vulture, Electro, Rhino, Scorpion, and Mr. Negative from the Raft prison break sequence.

chapters.name: Boss Rush: Sinister Six
chapters.summary: Sequential confrontations with each Sinister Six member across the contaminated cityscape.

chapters.name: Boss: Doctor Octopus

chapters.name: Ending: Aunt May
chapters.summary: Heartbreaking hospital epilogue with Peter unable to use the limited cure on his dying aunt.

title: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
guide: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order is Respawn Entertainment's 2019 Soulslike action-adventure set in the dark times after Order 66. Padawan survivor Cal Kestis attempts to rebuild the Jedi Order while hunted by Imperial Inquisitors. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. The cinematic playthrough emphasizes the Metroidvania-style world design.

chapters.name: Bracca Scrapyard

title: Star Wars Jedi: Survivor
guide: Star Wars Jedi: Survivor is Respawn's sequel to Fallen Order, set five years after the original. Cal Kestis is now a battle-hardened Jedi fighting the Empire as it tightens its grip on the galaxy. New abilities include dual-stance lightsaber styles (Single, Double-Bladed, Dual Wield, Blaster, Crossguard). The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Coruscant Infiltration
chapters.summary: Cold-open prologue infiltrating Senator Sejan's Coruscant skyscraper with Cal's new five-stance lightsaber combat.

chapters.name: Koboh Returns: The Singularity

title: Stellar Blade
guide: Stellar Blade is Shift Up's action title following EVE, a member of the 7th Airborne Squad sent from a space colony to reclaim Earth from the Naytibas, mutated creatures who drove humanity off the planet. The fast, precision-based combat draws comparison to Sekiro and NieR, with parries, dodges, and Beta/Burst skill trees. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across three parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Eidos 7 Drop
chapters.summary: Tutorial drop zone establishing combat fundamentals and EVE's connection to her squadron leader Tachy in the ruined city.

chapters.name: Wasteland Camp
chapters.summary: First semi-open hub area introducing the survivor Adam, the merchant Lily, and the side mission structure.

chapters.name: Altess Levoire
chapters.summary: Major dungeon-style location with vertical platforming, the iconic Tachy duel, and the first major boss encounter.

title: The Last of Us Part I Remastered
guide: The Last of Us Part I Remastered is Naughty Dog's PS5 ground-up remake of the 2013 PlayStation classic, with rebuilt assets, modern lighting, and updated AI. Smuggler Joel escorts immune teenager Ellie across a fungus-infested post-pandemic America in search of the Fireflies' research lab. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary, presented as a continuous cinematic playthrough.

chapters.name: Prologue: Outbreak Night
chapters.summary: Sarah's perspective as the cordyceps outbreak hits suburban Texas, ending in the devastating opening tragedy.

chapters.name: Ending: Jackson Approach
chapters.summary: Quiet conclusion driving back to Jackson with Ellie pressing Joel for the truth about the hospital — the famous lie.

title: The Last of Us Part II Remastered
guide: The Last of Us Part II Remastered is Naughty Dog's PS5 remaster of the 2020 sequel, adding the No Return roguelite mode, Lost Levels, and rebuilt rendering pipeline. The story follows Ellie pursuing revenge across post-apocalyptic Seattle, with the controversial mid-game switch to antagonist Abby's perspective. The walkthrough captures the full main campaign across three parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary.

chapters.name: Jackson
chapters.summary: Peaceful opening establishes Ellie's life in the Jackson community with Joel, before the inciting incident strikes.

chapters.name: Patrol
chapters.summary: Ellie and Dina patrol the winter wilderness; the chapter that ends with the Day One traumatic flashback sequence.

chapters.name: Seattle Day 1
chapters.summary: Arrival in occupied Seattle; first WLF (Washington Liberation Front) encounters and the Hillcrest exploration.

chapters.name: Seattle Day 2
chapters.summary: TV Station shoot-out and the aquarium horse-riding sequence leading to Owen and Mel's confrontation.

chapters.name: Seattle Day 3
chapters.summary: Hospital infestation level featuring the Rat King boss in one of the most harrowing horror sequences ever shipped.

chapters.name: The Theater
chapters.summary: Climactic Ellie chapter at the Seattle theater confronting Abby's group with the catastrophic mid-game pivot.

chapters.name: Abby Day 1
chapters.summary: Game switches to antagonist Abby, opening with the stadium sequence and the WLF/Seraphite war context.

chapters.name: Seraphite Island
chapters.summary: Abby's journey to the island Seraphite settlement, encounter with Yara and Lev, and the Rattler boss.

chapters.name: Day 2 with Lev
chapters.summary: Mid-game Abby chapter rescuing Lev from Seraphite captors while battling the WLF civil war that erupts.

chapters.name: Day 3 with Lev
chapters.summary: Final Seattle Abby chapter culminating in the theater confrontation now experienced from Abby's perspective.

chapters.name: Santa Barbara
chapters.summary: Time-jump final act in California's coastal ruins; the Rattlers slaving compound and the brutal final confrontation.

chapters.name: Ending: Farm Coda
chapters.summary: Final farm chapter where Ellie returns home; the contested closing sequence with the broken guitar.

title: Uncharted: Legacy of Thieves Collection
guide: Uncharted: Legacy of Thieves Collection bundles Uncharted 4: A Thief's End and Uncharted: The Lost Legacy in PS5-native form, featuring the full Drake-and-Sam-Drake adventure plus the Chloe Frazer-Nadine Ross spin-off. The walkthrough captures both games across two parts on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. Naughty Dog's cinematic set-piece direction is rendered at maximum PS5 Pro fidelity.

chapters.name: A Thief's End: Prologue Storm
chapters.summary: Cold open in the middle of the dramatic boat chase sequence before the proper opening flashback to Nathan's youth.

chapters.name: Italy: The Auction
chapters.summary: Brother Sam returns, the auction infiltration heist sequence in stealth and dialogue tones throughout the night.

chapters.name: Scotland: King's Bay
chapters.summary: First major open level exploring the founder's tomb on a cliffside Scottish island with grappling rope mechanics.

chapters.name: Madagascar Drive
chapters.summary: Open-jeep exploration across the Madagascar coastline in one of the franchise's most expansive vehicle sequences.

chapters.name: Pirate Colony: Libertalia
chapters.summary: Mid-game discovery of the pirate utopia ruins with the famous twelve founding pirates puzzle and trap rooms.

chapters.name: New Devon Forest
chapters.summary: Jungle traversal through the abandoned pirate colony forest with sniping ambush sequences and Crash Bandicoot tie-ins.

chapters.name: Boss: Rafe Adler
chapters.summary: Climactic sword duel atop a sinking pirate ship in flooded treasure chamber lit by burning sails.

chapters.name: Epilogue: Cassie
chapters.summary: Cinematic time-jump showing Nathan and Elena's daughter Cassie ten years later in the family home.

chapters.name: Lost Legacy: Western Ghats
chapters.summary: Chloe Frazer's spin-off opens in the open Western Ghats jungles of India hunting the lost Hoysala tusk.

chapters.name: Lost Legacy: Hoysala Capital
chapters.summary: Major hub-area exploration of the lost city of Halebidu with the largest puzzle density in the franchise.

chapters.name: Lost Legacy: Train Set-piece
chapters.summary: Naughty Dog's signature train sequence reimagined for Chloe and Nadine, cars uncoupling across moving train cars.

chapters.name: Lost Legacy Ending
chapters.summary: Cinematic confrontation with Asav at the Hoysala citadel, closing the franchise's expanded universe.

title: Until Dawn Remake
guide: Until Dawn Remake is Ballistic Moon's PS5 remake of the 2015 Supermassive Games choice-based teen horror title. Eight friends gather at a remote mountain lodge one year after a tragic accident, only to face supernatural threats and a deranged killer. The walkthrough captures the full campaign on PS5 Pro at 4K HDR 60FPS with PSSR upscaling, no commentary. The Butterfly Effect choice system means every QTE response shapes who survives Until Dawn.

chapters.name: Prologue: The Prank
chapters.summary: Cold open one year prior establishing the prank gone wrong that led to the deaths of Hannah and Beth Washington in the snow.

chapters.name: The Lodge Arrives
chapters.summary: One year later, the eight friends arrive at the Washington family lodge for a reunion winter weekend getaway.

chapters.name: First Disturbance
chapters.summary: Mysterious voyeur figure begins stalking the group as the first major Butterfly Effect choices play out.

chapters.name: The Sanatorium
chapters.summary: Discovery of the abandoned sanatorium connected to the mountain's dark mining history and the Wendigo legend.

chapters.name: Mike's Pursuit
chapters.summary: Mike chapter through the snowy woods chasing a fleeing figure with the most intense decision-time pressure sequences.

chapters.name: Hannah's Journal
chapters.summary: Discovery of the lost-girl Hannah's diary revealing what happened in the wilderness after the prank — the Wendigo origin.

chapters.name: Sam's Bath Pursuit
chapters.summary: Iconic chapter where Sam is pursued through the lodge in a towel by the mysterious psycho with the slasher tone shift.

chapters.name: The Wendigo Reveal
chapters.summary: Major mid-game twist revealing the creatures' true nature: cannibalism transforms humans into Wendigo monsters.

chapters.name: Mine Descent
chapters.summary: Group descends into the mountain mine network where the Wendigo population breeds in the geological tunnels.

chapters.name: Sanatorium Climax
chapters.summary: Penultimate combat-decision sequence in the sanatorium with the largest cluster of make-or-break Butterfly Effect choices.

chapters.name: Ending: Until Dawn
chapters.summary: Final escape sequence with survivor count determined by accumulated player decisions throughout the campaign.
